evals.prompt: Check my AAPL covered call, sold $260 call for $3.33, expires Apr 24 2026.
evals.expected_output: Status card showing AAPL stock price, buffer to $260 strike, call P&L, zone classification (likely SAFE since AAPL is well below $260). Should include current call value, delta, time value.

assertions.name: status_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains a formatted status card with zone classification

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response clearly states one of the five zones (SAFE, WATCH, WARNING, DANGER, ACT NOW)

assertions.name: has_buffer_pct
assertions.description: Response shows the buffer percentage between stock price and the $260 strike

assertions.name: has_call_pnl
assertions.description: Response shows current P&L on the call (premium received vs current call value)

evals.prompt: How is my NVDA $185 call doing? Premium was $3.27, expires Apr 24 2026. I bought my shares at $150.
evals.expected_output: Status card with zone classification plus cost basis section showing effective cost basis ($146.73) and called-away P&L relative to $150 entry.

assertions.name: status_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains a formatted status card with zone classification

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response clearly states one of the five zones

assertions.name: shows_cost_basis
assertions.description: Response shows effective cost basis after premium ($150 - $3.27 = $146.73)

assertions.name: shows_called_away_pnl
assertions.description: Response shows the P&L if shares are called away at $185 relative to $150 cost basis

assertions.name: has_actionable_guidance
assertions.description: Response provides guidance that considers whether being called away is acceptable given the cost basis

evals.prompt: Will my shares get called away? I sold the $560 call on SPY for $4.50, expires Apr 17 2026.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger the monitor, show SPY's current position relative to $560 strike, and directly answer the assignment question based on buffer and delta.

assertions.name: triggers_monitor
assertions.description: Response uses the covered call monitor to fetch live data rather than giving generic advice

assertions.name: answers_assignment_question
assertions.description: Response directly answers whether assignment is likely based on current stock price vs $560 strike

assertions.name: has_buffer_pct
assertions.description: Response shows the buffer percentage between SPY and the $560 strike

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response clearly states one of the five zones

assertions.name: has_actionable_guidance
assertions.description: Response provides a concrete suggestion based on the zone
